expectedIssues: Wrong Poker item is highlighted in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the content area, cutting off the lower row of game tiles so their full cards are not visible.
Multiple horizontal sections are clipped on the right side, including the top category tabs and the game carousels, leaving the last item partially off-screen.

expected.reasoning: Neither reported issue describes a Poker item being incorrectly highlighted in the bottom nav bar; they describe content overlap and clipping issues instead.
